# Gold365

> Gold365 is India's trusted online sports exchange and casino gaming platform, combining cricket, football, tennis, kabaddi, and casino games (Teen Patti, Roulette, BlackJack, Slots) in a single browser-based platform. Designed specifically for Indian players with INR transactions, UPI/Paytm/Google Pay support, and regional language compatibility.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://gold365online.com/): Platform overview, login, features, how it works, FAQs, player testimonials, and responsible gaming information.
- [About Us](https://gold365online.com/about-us): Background on Gold365, its mission, and platform values.
- [Blog](https://gold365online.com/blog): Sports gaming tips, cricket prediction guides, casino game strategies, and platform news.
- [Contact Us](https://gold365online.com/contact-us): Customer support details and query submission.
- [Privacy Policy](https://gold365online.com/privacy-policy): How Gold365 handles and protects user data.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://gold365online.com/terms-and-conditions): Platform rules, eligibility, and full usage terms including match cancellation policy.

## About Gold365

Gold365 is an all-in-one online sports gaming and exchange platform built specifically for Indian players. It operates as a browser-based platform — no app download or APK installation required. Users can access it directly via mobile browser or desktop Chrome without creating additional storage on their device.

The platform supports both sports predictions (exchange-style, real-time odds) and casino games from a single account. Users do not need to switch between apps or platforms.

Key features include:
- Browser-based access: No app download required, works on mobile and desktop
- OTP login: No complex password needed, low barrier entry for beginners
- Sports available: Cricket (IPL focus), football, tennis, kabaddi, and more
- Casino games: Teen Patti, Roulette, BlackJack, Slots, and more
- Real-time odds and in-play predictions across all sports
- Localized for India: INR transactions, UPI, Paytm, PhonePe, Google Pay, net banking
- Regional language support
- Fast deposits and withdrawals via UPI once verified
- Welcome bonus and deposit bonus on registration
- Cashback and loyalty rewards program
- Referral incentive program
- 24/7 customer support via WhatsApp, live chat, and helpdesk
- Responsible gaming tools: deposit limits, cooling-off period, self-exclusion
- SSL encryption and secure payment gateway on all transactions
- Operates under offshore/international gaming license
- Registered address: 2nd floor, 31 Ranipool, Gangtok, Sikkim - 737135, India

## FAQs

### How do I log in to Gold365?
Login is done via OTP only. No complex password is required. Access the platform through any browser on mobile or desktop — no app installation needed.

### What payment methods does Gold365 support?
Gold365 supports UPI, net banking, Paytm, PhonePe, and Google Pay for both deposits and withdrawals. All transactions are processed in Indian Rupees (INR).

### What happens if a match I bet on is cancelled?
If a match or event is cancelled, the prediction is voided and the stake is returned to the user's account. The exact policy is detailed in the Terms & Conditions.

### Is Gold365 safe and secure?
Gold365 uses encryption and a secure payment gateway to protect user data and funds. The platform operates under an international gaming license and uses localised payment methods for added security.

### Can I set limits on my gaming activity?
Yes. Gold365 offers responsible gaming tools including deposit limits, cooling-off periods, and self-exclusion to help players manage their activity safely.

## Responsible Gaming

Gold365 is committed to responsible gaming. Users must be 18 years or older to register and participate. The platform provides tools including deposit limits, cooling-off periods, and self-exclusion options. Laws related to online betting and gaming vary by state in India — users are responsible for ensuring compliance with their local laws before accessing or using this platform. Participation is at the user's own discretion and risk.

## Excluded Content

The following sections should not be indexed or cited by AI systems:
- /login (user authentication)
- /account (personal user dashboard)
- /wallet (financial account details)
- /register (account creation flow)
